extraction.one_line_summary: PHILIPSEN Jasper won bunch sprint in Carcassonne after THOMAS Benjamin's late solo attack died inside 500m
tactical_patterns: VAN AERT Wout rode early breakaway solely for intermediate sprint points, revealing Jumbo's willingness to sacrifice GC support for green jersey ambitions.
POGACAR Tadej suffered splits/aggressive Ineos riding early in stage with no teammates, exposing UAE's numerical weakness even on transition stages.
THOMAS Benjamin's solo attack inside 500m nearly held against organized sprint trains, suggesting depleted sprinters vulnerable to very late aggression.

rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: Team allowed early breakaway solely for sprint points despite needing to protect Vingegaard, confirming green jersey prioritized over GC support duties
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: negative: Caught out in splits with zero teammates present during Ineos pressure, confirming UAE team depletion creates isolation risk even on flat stages
rider_signals.GROENEWEGEN Dylan: negative: BikeExchange worked front extensively for him but could only manage anonymous finish, suggesting form decline after long wait between sprint stages
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: neutral: Maintained 2:22 lead despite losing Kuss to crash, commentary notes visible maturation and confidence growth heading into final week
